title: Can't search phone numbers
excerpt:

posts.author: MichelleMikula (Michelle)
posts.cookedHtml:
why doesnt the general search include the phone column on monday?
often customer’s call asking us to provide an update on their project and leave only a phone number. The general search board doesnt show anything. i have to go into each individual board and search phone numbers in there. it is really time consuming. any fix for this?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Michelle! Charlotte here from the monday team!

This is very odd - you should be able to search for phone numbers and see results! Are you typing them in a specific format?

I just tested it out on my end and wrote the number with no spaces like this: 1234567890

Try that in an incognito window and if you’re still running into these issues, get in contact with our support team here!

posts.author: Rosemarys (Rosemarys)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately, it sounds like the search tool might be missing some key details. Have you tried reaching out the tech team?
